About Me

A Designer
Who Lives
Fully

I'm Sidhant — a multidisciplinary UI/UX and visual designer based in New Delhi. Great design lives at the intersection of clarity and emotion, where systems meet storytelling.

My work spans product interfaces, brand identities, digital art, and visual systems. I bring the same obsessive intentionality to every pixel — whether it's a healthcare app or a character illustration.

Beyond screens, I'm deeply into fashion, street culture, and self-expression. My visual sensibility is shaped as much by what I wear as by what I design.

"Design is not decoration —
it's the architecture of intention."

🎨 Visual Designer 👟 Fashion Enthusiast 📸 Visual Storyteller 🎭 Digital Artist
What I Do

Skills & Tools

◈
UI/UX Design
End-to-end product design from research to pixel-perfect delivery.
◉
Visual Design
Editorial layouts, typographic systems, and high-impact communication.
◎
Branding
Distinctive identities with cohesive visual language across all touchpoints.
⬡
Design Systems
Scalable, token-based component libraries that help teams ship faster.
◻
Wireframing
Rapid lo-fi to hi-fi prototyping that validates ideas before code.
◌
UX Research
User interviews, usability studies, and synthesis for real decisions.
✦
Figma
Advanced components, auto-layout, variables & interactive prototypes.
◆
Adobe Suite
Photoshop, Illustrator, Corel Draw — imagery, illustration and print.
⬘
Digital Art
Character illustration, fan art, digital painting with cinematic depth.
Career

Experience

Latest — Delhi
Graphic Designer
Eunoia Designs Pvt. Ltd.

Designed website mock-ups aligned with brand identity and UX goals. Created wallpapers, room decals, and furniture sticker designs. Coordinated with 2D and 3D design teams for cohesive output.

Global Events
Graphic Designer
Electronics & Computer Software Export Promotion Council of India (ESC India)

Designed branding for IndiaSoft and India Electronics Expo, attended by 1,000+ international delegates. Revamped ESC's visual communication across digital and print under high-pressure timelines.

IIT Delhi
Design Research Intern
Indian Institute of Technology, Delhi

Developed curriculum for grades 9–12 under the SOSE initiative. Applied Octalysis Framework to gamify digital learning. Researched declining popularity of Indian comics through cultural case studies.
